de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement

Class JavaStatement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.JavaStatement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Assert, BranchStatement, JumpStatement, LabeledStatement, LoopStatement, MethodFrame, StatementBlock, SynchronizedBlock, TransactionStatement

    public abstract class JavaStatement
extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
implements Statement
    Default implementation for non-terminal Java statements.
